security.csp: default-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:*; script-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http://127.0.0.1:*; font-src 'self' data: http://127.0.0.1:*; img-src 'self' data: asset: https://asset.localhost http://127.0.0.1:*; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://127.0.0.1:* http://127.0.0.1:*
